mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 0.3 percentage points over one month signals deteriorating labor market conditions, prompting risk-off behavior and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or UNRATE's predictive power fails in out-of-sample tests (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and core inflation indicates strong demand pressures, leading to higher corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect collapses (p > 0.05) or 60-day returns in high INDPRO/CPIAUCSL regimes are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in housing starts below 1300 thousand units signals weak consumer demand, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days during late-cycle expansions.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of low HOUST regimes, or HOUST's predictive power fails in out-of-sample tests (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer spending (RSAFS) combined with strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) indicates robust economic momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect collapses (p > 0.05) or 20-day returns in high RSAFS/PAYEMS regimes are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A tightening cycle characterized by rising federal funds rates and declining money supply (RSAFS) compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect collapses (p > 0.05) or 60-day returns in tightening regimes are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in payroll employment growth below 100k signals weak labor market conditions, prompting negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days during high-volatility regimes.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of low PAYEMS regimes, or PAYEMS's predictive power fails in out-of-sample tests (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production below 105 index points indicates weakening supply chain conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days during stagflationary regimes.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of low INDPRO regimes, or INDPRO's predictive power fails in out-of-sample tests (p > 0.1).
